compounddef.initializer: template<typename T> concept erbsland::cterm::PrintableArg = std::constructible_from<Foreground, T> || std::constructible_from<Background, T> || std::same_as<Color, T> || std::same_as<CharAttributes, T> || std::same_as<CharStyle, T> || std::same_as<Char, T> || std::same_as<String, T> || std::same_as<StringView, T> || std::same_as<std::decay_t<T>, std::string> || std::same_as<std::decay_t<T>, std::string_view> || std::same_as<std::decay_t<T>, std::u32string> || std::same_as<std::decay_t<T>, std::u32string_view> || std::same_as<T, const char *> || std::same_as<T, const char32_t *>

briefdescription.para: A value accepted by Terminal::print() and Terminal::printLine() or String::append().
